description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named build and a job called deploy that runs only on the master branch and does not allow failure. Use an appropriate Docker image for Gradle (e.g., gradle:8-jdk17) or the default runner image. In the deploy job, execute the commands `chmod +x gradlew` followed by `./gradlew clean build artifactoryPublish --stacktrace`. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined, and the job runs in the build stage.
